faqs.question: What is MATW?
faqs.answer: MATW (Muslims Around The World Project) is a registered charity providing humanitarian aid including food, clean water, shelter and emergency relief to vulnerable communities in Gaza, Sudan, Yemen, Afghanistan and Rohingya refugee settlements.

faqs.question: How does MATW use my donation?
faqs.answer: MATW operates a 100% Donation Policy. After merchant and banking fees, 100% of your donation goes directly to project costs and donor engagement. We are transparent about all fund usage.

faqs.question: What is Zakat and how do I calculate it?
faqs.answer: Zakat is an Islamic obligation to give 2.5% of qualifying wealth annually. Use our Zakat Calculator tool on the website to determine your Zakat amount based on your savings and assets.

faqs.question: Can I set up monthly donations?
faqs.answer: Yes. Visit our Regular Giving section to set up automatic monthly donations via credit card or bank transfer. Monthly giving provides consistent support to ongoing projects.

faqs.question: Which countries does MATW operate in?
faqs.answer: MATW currently provides aid in Gaza, Sudan, Yemen, Afghanistan, and Rohingya refugee settlements in Bangladesh. We focus on communities facing ongoing humanitarian crises.

faqs.question: How much should I donate?
faqs.answer: Any amount makes a difference. We offer suggested amounts ($85, $200, $500, $700+), but you can donate any amount. Even small contributions help provide food, water and emergency relief.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. All payments are processed securely through our 100% Secure Checkout.

faqs.question: Is my donation tax-deductible?
faqs.answer: Yes. MATW International Ltd (ABN 60610666325) is endorsed as a Deductible Gift Recipient (DGR). You can claim your donation as a tax deduction in Australia.

faqs.question: How does MATW deliver aid in conflict zones?
faqs.answer: MATW works with local teams and trusted partners on the ground to distribute aid safely and efficiently. We prioritize community relationships and ensure aid reaches vulnerable families.

faqs.question: What is the Forgotten Ummah appeal?
faqs.answer: The Forgotten Ummah supports families affected by ongoing humanitarian crises that no longer dominate news headlines. Donations provide food, water, shelter and relief to neglected communities.

faqs.question: Can I donate specifically to Gaza?
faqs.answer: Yes. Choose 'Donate to Gaza' to support the Gaza Emergency Appeal. Your donation provides food, medical care, water and essential relief to families in Gaza.

faqs.question: How can I support the Rohingya?
faqs.answer: Donate through our Rohingya Refugee Appeal. Your contribution provides food, water and essential services to nearly one million refugees in overcrowded settlements in Bangladesh.

faqs.question: What is Sadaqah?
faqs.answer: Sadaqah is voluntary charitable giving beyond the obligation of Zakat. It can be given anytime and in any amount. Use our 'Give Sadaqah' option to make voluntary donations.

faqs.question: Can I build a well or mosque through MATW?
faqs.answer: Yes. Visit our 'Build a Well' or 'Build a Mosque' sections to sponsor water wells or mosque construction in communities that need them most.

faqs.question: How can I volunteer with MATW?
faqs.answer: Visit our Volunteer page to explore volunteer opportunities. You can help with fundraising, awareness campaigns, or administrative work depending on your skills and availability.

faqs.question: Does MATW have a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes. Download our MATW app to donate, track your Zakat, access the Zakat Calculator, and stay updated on live distributions and project progress.

faqs.question: What are your contact details?
faqs.answer: Phone: +61 2 9758 9037 (9am-10pm). Address: Level 2, 47 Rickard Road, Bankstown, NSW 2200, Australia. Email available on our Contact page.

faqs.question: How do I report a scam claiming to be MATW?
faqs.answer: Report suspicious activity to our team immediately. Visit our Scams & Phishing page for guidance. MATW only operates through matwproject.org and official social media accounts.

faqs.question: Can I get a receipt for my donation?
faqs.answer: Yes. You'll receive a donation receipt via email after your transaction. For tax purposes, keep this receipt as proof of your charitable contribution.

faqs.question: Does MATW work with other organizations?
faqs.answer: Yes. MATW partners with local teams, trusted NGOs, and community organizations on the ground to maximize impact and ensure efficient aid delivery to vulnerable populations.
